ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JasperFx/wolverine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JasperFx/wolverine
Language: c%23
Supercharged .NET server side development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kareadita/Kavita
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kareadita/Kavita
Language: c%23
Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner
Language: c%23
The Runner for GitHub Actions 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet
Language: c%23
Home of .NET's Virtual Monolithic Repository which includes all the code needed to build the .NET SDK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gui-cs/Terminal.Gui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gui-cs/Terminal.Gui
Language: c%23
Cross Platform Terminal UI toolkit for .NET

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jynew/jynew
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jynew/jynew
Language: c%23
JinYongLegend-like RPG Game Framework with full Modding support and 10+ hours playable samples of game.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unchihugo/FluentFlyout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unchihugo/FluentFlyout
Language: c%23
The modern Flyout app for Windows 11, built with Fluent 2 Design principles. Media Flyouts, Taskbar Widgets and more.
